homepage.heroSubline: Durable, energy-efficient windows and doors built for the desert climate. Upgrade your home with Windoors & Renovations.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Crafted for El Paso
aboutText: Windoors & Renovations started with a simple goal: to provide El Paso homeowners with top-quality window and door solutions that stand up to our harsh climate. We're a locally owned and operated business, deeply rooted in this community.

Our approach is straightforward. We listen to your needs, offer honest advice, and deliver exceptional workmanship. We believe in doing the job right the first time, using only the best materials and proven installation techniques.

We're proud to serve the El Paso area and are committed to giving back. We actively support local initiatives and strive to create lasting relationships with our customers. We're not just contractors; we're your neighbors.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand El Paso's unique climate and architectural styles, ensuring the perfect fit for your home.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We source durable, energy-efficient windows and doors designed to withstand the desert heat and minimize energy costs.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Our skilled team provides precise and professional installation, guaranteeing long-lasting performance and weather protection.

valueProps.title: Customer Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We're dedicated to providing exceptional service and ensuring your complete satisfaction from start to finish.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Windoors & Renovations for a free consultation and discover the difference quality windows and doors can make.

services.name: Window Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert window installation services tailored for El Paso homes.
services.description:
Proper window installation is crucial for energy efficiency and weather protection in El Paso's climate. Our team has extensive experience installing all types of windows, from traditional double-hung windows to modern casement and sliding windows. We work with a variety of materials, including vinyl, wood, and aluminum, to match your home's style and budget.

Our installation process begins with a thorough assessment of your existing window openings. We carefully remove the old windows, prepare the opening, and ensure a precise fit for the new windows. We use high-quality sealants and insulation to prevent air leaks and water damage, ensuring optimal performance and energy savings. We also offer custom window solutions for unique architectural features or specific design requirements.

Whether you're replacing old, drafty windows or building a new home, Windoors & Renovations provides reliable and professional window installation services that enhance the beauty, comfort, and value of your property. Trust us to deliver exceptional results that stand the test of time.

faq.question: How long does window installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of window installation depends on the number of windows and the complexity of the project. We'll provide an estimated timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: What type of windows are best for El Paso's climate?
faq.answer: Low-E windows with insulated frames are ideal for El Paso's hot summers. They reflect heat and reduce energy consumption.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your window installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on both the windows and the installation workmanship.

services.name: Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish door installation services for your El Paso home.
services.description:
A properly installed door is essential for security, energy efficiency, and curb appeal. We specialize in installing a wide range of doors, including entry doors, patio doors, and interior doors. Whether you're looking for a sturdy steel door for enhanced security or an elegant wood door to complement your home's style, we have the expertise to handle any installation project.

Our door installation process includes precise measurements, careful removal of the old door, and expert fitting of the new door. We ensure that the door is properly aligned, sealed, and secured to prevent drafts and unauthorized entry. We also install high-quality hardware, such as locks, handles, and hinges, for smooth and reliable operation.

From classic designs to modern styles, we offer a variety of door options to suit your taste and budget. We work with leading manufacturers to provide durable, energy-efficient doors that enhance the beauty and functionality of your home. Trust Windoors & Renovations to deliver professional door installation services that exceed your expectations.
process: Step 4: Hardware Installation and Security Check

faq.question: What types of doors do you install?
faq.answer: We install entry doors, patio doors, interior doors, and storm doors in various materials, including wood, steel, fiberglass, and vinyl.

faq.question: How do I choose the right door for my home?
faq.answer: Consider your budget, style preferences, security needs, and energy efficiency goals. We can help you select the perfect door during a consultation.

faq.question: Do you offer door repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide door repair services for issues such as damaged frames, broken hinges, and faulty locks.

services.name: Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Transform your home with energy-efficient window replacements.
services.description:
Replacing old, inefficient windows can significantly improve your home's energy efficiency and comfort. Windoors & Renovations specializes in window replacement services that enhance the beauty, value, and performance of your property. We offer a wide selection of replacement windows in various styles, materials, and colors to match your home's architectural design.

Our window replacement process begins with a thorough inspection of your existing windows to identify areas of air leakage, water damage, or structural issues. We then provide a detailed proposal outlining the best replacement options for your needs and budget. Our skilled installers carefully remove the old windows, prepare the openings, and install the new windows with precision and attention to detail.

We use high-quality sealants and insulation to ensure a tight, weather-resistant fit, preventing drafts and reducing energy consumption. We also offer energy-efficient window options, such as low-E glass and argon gas fills, to maximize energy savings. Trust Windoors & Renovations to deliver seamless window replacement services that transform your home into a more comfortable and energy-efficient living space.

faq.question: How do I know if I need to replace my windows?
faq.answer: Signs of window replacement include drafts, condensation, difficulty opening or closing, and visible damage.

faq.question: What are the benefits of energy-efficient windows?
faq.answer: Energy-efficient windows reduce heat transfer, lower energy bills, and improve indoor comfort.

faq.question: How much does window replacement cost?
faq.answer: The cost of window replacement depends on the number of windows, the type of windows, and the complexity of the installation. We provide free estimates.

services.name: Patio Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your outdoor living space with our patio door installation services.
services.description:
Patio doors provide seamless access to your outdoor living space while enhancing the beauty and functionality of your home. Windoors & Renovations specializes in patio door installation services that create a smooth transition between your indoor and outdoor areas. We offer a variety of patio door styles, including sliding glass doors, French doors, and bi-fold doors, to suit your design preferences.

Our patio door installation process includes precise measurements, careful removal of the old door, and expert fitting of the new door. We ensure that the door is properly aligned, sealed, and secured to prevent drafts and unauthorized entry. We also install high-quality hardware, such as locks, handles, and screens, for smooth and reliable operation.

Whether you're looking to create a cozy outdoor retreat or a spacious entertainment area, we can help you choose the perfect patio door to complement your home's style and enhance your outdoor living experience. Trust Windoors & Renovations to deliver professional patio door installation services that transform your backyard into a relaxing and inviting space.
process: Step 4: Hardware Installation and Security Check

faq.question: What are the benefits of sliding glass doors?
faq.answer: Sliding glass doors offer easy access to your patio, maximize natural light, and save space.

faq.question: What are the benefits of French doors?
faq.answer: French doors add elegance and charm to your home, providing a classic and sophisticated look.

faq.question: What are the benefits of bi-fold doors?
faq.answer: Bi-fold doors create a wide opening to your outdoor space, perfect for entertaining and enjoying the outdoors.

services.name: Storm Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Protect your home from the elements with our durable storm door solutions.
services.description:
Storm doors are an excellent addition to any El Paso home, providing an extra layer of protection against the elements. Windoors & Renovations offers professional storm door installation services that enhance the security, energy efficiency, and curb appeal of your property. We offer a variety of storm door styles, including full-view, half-view, and self-storing models, to suit your needs and preferences.

Our storm door installation process includes precise measurements, careful installation of the door frame, and expert fitting of the door panel. We ensure that the door is properly aligned, sealed, and secured to prevent drafts and unauthorized entry. We also install high-quality hardware, such as locks, handles, and closers, for smooth and reliable operation.

Whether you're looking to protect your entry door from the harsh desert sun or add an extra layer of security to your home, we can help you choose the perfect storm door to meet your needs. Trust Windoors & Renovations to deliver professional storm door installation services that enhance the comfort, security, and value of your home.
process: Step 4: Hardware Installation and Security Check

faq.question: What are the benefits of a full-view storm door?
faq.answer: Full-view storm doors allow maximum natural light and provide an unobstructed view of your front yard.

faq.question: What are the benefits of a half-view storm door?
faq.answer: Half-view storm doors offer a balance of natural light and privacy, with a solid panel at the bottom.

faq.question: What are the benefits of a self-storing storm door?
faq.answer: Self-storing storm doors feature a retractable screen that can be easily adjusted for ventilation.

services.name: Custom Window Solutions
services.shortDescription: Unique window designs tailored to your El Paso home's architecture.
services.description:
For homes with unique architectural features or specific design requirements, Windoors & Renovations offers custom window solutions that perfectly match your vision. We work closely with you to design and install custom windows that enhance the beauty, functionality, and value of your property. Whether you need unusually shaped windows, oversized windows, or windows with specific energy-efficient features, we have the expertise to bring your ideas to life.

Our custom window process begins with a detailed consultation to understand your needs and preferences. We then create custom designs that meet your specifications, using high-quality materials and advanced manufacturing techniques. Our skilled installers carefully install the custom windows, ensuring a precise fit and optimal performance.

We offer a variety of custom window options, including different shapes, sizes, materials, and finishes. We also offer energy-efficient glass options, such as low-E glass and argon gas fills, to maximize energy savings. Trust Windoors & Renovations to deliver exceptional custom window solutions that transform your home into a unique and personalized living space.
process: Step 2: Custom Window Design and Manufacturing
Step 4: Quality Inspection and Customer Satisfaction

faq.question: What types of custom window shapes do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of custom window shapes, including arched, circular, triangular, and trapezoidal windows.

faq.question: What materials can I choose for custom windows?
faq.answer: You can choose from a variety of materials, including wood, vinyl, aluminum, and fiberglass.

faq.question: How long does it take to manufacture custom windows?
faq.answer: The manufacturing time for custom windows depends on the complexity of the design and the materials used. We provide an estimated timeline during the consultation.

We're committed to providing El Paso with top-quality products and exceptional customer service. Contact us today for a free consultation and discover how Windoors & Renovations can transform your El Paso home.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Windoors & Renovations did an amazing job replacing all the windows in my Sunset Heights home. The new windows look fantastic and have made a huge difference in keeping my house cool during the summer months. The team was professional, efficient, and very respectful of my property. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Ricardo L.
reviews.text: I recently had a sliding glass door installed by Windoors & Renovations, and I'm very pleased with the results. The door looks great and opens smoothly. There was a minor issue with the screen, but they came back promptly to fix it. Overall, a positive experience.

reviews.name: Susan K.
reviews.text: My front door was old and drafty. Windoors & Renovations installed a beautiful new steel door that is not only more secure but also much more energy-efficient. The installation team was professional and courteous, and they cleaned up everything afterward. Great service!

reviews.name: David M.
reviews.text: We had Windoors & Renovations install new windows in our Upper Valley home, and we couldn't be happier. The team was knowledgeable, efficient, and paid attention to every detail. The windows look fantastic and have significantly reduced the noise from the street.

reviews.name: Elizabeth P.
reviews.text: I had a storm door installed to protect my front door from the El Paso sun. The installation was quick and easy. The door looks great and provides extra security. I would definitely use Windoors & Renovations again.

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: Excellent service from start to finish. The team at Windoors & Renovations helped me choose the perfect replacement windows for my Kern Place bungalow. The installation was flawless, and the new windows have made a huge difference in the comfort of my home.
